title: An Act to Strengthen the Freedom of Access Act by Categorizing Commercial Requesters
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Feb 3, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 2/3/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
